Manual Installation

computer

Step 1

download

Why Install?

speedFast, offline-capable experience
homeQuick access from home screen
notificationsReceive order notifications
battery_saverLower battery consumption

Works on iOS 16.4+, Android 12+, and desktop Chrome/Edge/Safari
